glitches.name: Backwards Long Jump (BLJ)
glitches.label: BLJ_label
glitches.description: The fundamental glitch that exploits the lack of a speed cap by repeatedly performing backwards long jumps to gain unlimited negative hyperspeed.

variants.name: LBLJ
variants.label: LBLJ_label
variants.description: A location-specific BLJ using castle lobby pillars to clip through the 8-star door.

variants.name: SBLJ (Side BLJ)
variants.label: SBLJ_label
variants.description: A variant performed sideways against stairs or slopes to accumulate speed via geometry snapping.

applications.name: DDD Skip
applications.label: DDD_skip_label
applications.description: A specialized application of SBLJ to bypass both the 30-star door and the DDD water wall simultaneously.

variants.name: BLJ Strat (Musharna)
variants.label: BLJ_strat_label
variants.description: Performing a BLJ on a moving elevator to skip the toxic maze wire fence.

glitches.name: Miscellaneous Wall Clipping
glitches.label: Miscellaneous_wall_clipping_label
glitches.description: Bypassing collision via geometry gaps using long jumps or kicks, without hyperspeed.

variants.name: Ledge Clipping
variants.label: Ledge_clipping_label
variants.description: Exploiting the momentary collision gap when grabbing or pulling up from a ledge.

applications.name: Cannonless
applications.label: Cannonless_label
applications.description: A precise ledge-clipping setup to grab stars directly from wall gaps, skipping cannon usage.

variants.name: Ship Clip
variants.label: Ship_clip_label
variants.description: Swimming at a precise angle into the sunken ship's hull to skip the eel-luring sequence.

glitches.name: Box TJ
glitches.label: Box_TJ_label
glitches.description: Using a Triple Jump on a '!' block to pass through ceiling collision gaps.

glitches.name: Ground Pound Clipping
glitches.label: Ground_pound_clipping_label
glitches.description: Exploiting the mid-air stall before a ground pound to pass through moving object collision.

glitches.name: Bob-omb Clip
glitches.label: Bob-omb_clip_label
glitches.description: Using explosion knockback or grab-frame acceleration to force Mario through hitboxes.

applications.name: Pillarless
applications.label: Pillarless_label
applications.description: An advanced bloated Bob-omb glitch to clip into the pyramid, skipping pillar activation.

glitches.name: Chuckya Clip
glitches.label: Chuckya_clip_label
glitches.description: Using the state of being held or the recoil of throwing a Chuckya to pass through walls.

glitches.name: MIPS Clip
glitches.label: MIPS_clip_label
glitches.description: Exploiting the pushing collision of MIPS the rabbit to force Mario through star doors.

glitches.name: Door Clip
glitches.label: Door_clip_label
glitches.description: Using text box animation locks to bypass door opening sequences and collision.

glitches.name: Monkey Bug
glitches.label: Monkey_bug_label
glitches.description: Interacting with Ukkiki to skip his walking animation after being dropped at the star cage.

glitches.name: Pole Glitch
glitches.label: Pole_glitch_label
glitches.description: An instant coordinate warp from the base of a pole to the wire mesh above.

glitches.name: Insta Clip
glitches.label: Insta_clip_label
glitches.description: A physics abnormality causing an immediate teleport between water bodies of different heights.
